slides.title: PM Operating System Update
slides.headline: The presentation system should become a narrative renderer.
slides.core_message: Better slides need better evidence packaging and publish controls, not just stronger CSS.

composition_payload.primary_claim: The presentation system should be funded as a narrative rendering system, not treated as a visual polish pass.
composition_payload.summary: Better slides need better evidence packaging and publish controls, not just stronger CSS.

options.label: Recommended path
options.summary: Fund the presentation system as a narrative rendering system.
tradeoffs: More schema and runtime complexity in the short term.
Much higher narrative and trust quality long term.

evidence_items.label: Decision frame
evidence_items.value: Current briefs model intent and key points but not story arc or speaker notes.
evidence_items.annotation: The architecture gap appears before rendering.

evidence_items.label: Delivery implication
evidence_items.value: Publishing modes need different density rules.
evidence_items.annotation: Mode-specific behavior must be designed intentionally.

slides.speaker_notes: Introduce the recommendation and make the architecture gap explicit.
slides.visual_direction: Large hero headline with a compact recommendation strip.

variant_rules.live: Keep only the headline and recommendation strip on screen.
variant_rules.async: Show both evidence bullets directly on the slide.
variant_rules.memo: Expand the core message into a short explanatory paragraph.

slides.title: Where We Are
slides.headline: The platform already has strong source material.
slides.core_message: The limiting factor is the presentation grammar, not lack of product context.

composition_payload.primary_claim: ProductOS already has enough structured operating material; the quality loss happens in evidence packaging and story planning.
composition_payload.summary: The limiting factor is the presentation grammar, not lack of product context.

evidence_items.label: Upstream inputs
evidence_items.value: Leadership, portfolio, and status artifacts are already available as inputs.

evidence_items.label: Current loss point
evidence_items.value: The current deck pipeline removes source-linked evidence from the rendered output.
evidence_items.annotation: The problem is in the presentation grammar.

slides.speaker_notes: Show the evidence as cards to make the case for a richer intermediate model.
slides.visual_direction: Two-column evidence grid with visible source labels.

variant_rules.live: Collapse the second card into a presenter note.
variant_rules.async: Render both cards with source tags.
variant_rules.memo: Convert the cards into a short evidence section.

slides.title: What Still Needs Work
slides.headline: Narrative quality needs trust controls.
slides.core_message: More persuasive output is only acceptable if the system keeps uncertainty and export limitations visible.

composition_payload.primary_claim: Narrative upgrades are only acceptable if publish controls keep evidence, uncertainty, and export tradeoffs visible.
composition_payload.summary: More persuasive output is only acceptable if the system keeps uncertainty and export limitations visible.

evidence_items.label: Fidelity risk
evidence_items.value: PPT export fidelity still depends on simpler slide compositions.
evidence_items.annotation: The publish path still has layout constraints.

evidence_items.label: Trust risk
evidence_items.value: Executive compression cannot hide blockers, risks, or confidence gaps.
evidence_items.annotation: Narrative power must not outrun governance.

risk_items.label: PPT export fidelity still depends on simpler slide compositions.
risk_items.mitigation: Publish checks and fallback compositions keep the message intact.

slides.speaker_notes: Position publish checks as a hard requirement for trustworthy automation.
slides.visual_direction: Risk matrix with confidence badge and mitigation callout.

variant_rules.live: Keep the highest-risk point visible and move the second point to notes.
variant_rules.async: Render both risks with confidence treatment.
variant_rules.memo: Expand into a governance paragraph with visible caveats.
